# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for our legacy Python 2.7 application. We need to maintain compatibility with our existing codebase while we plan the migration to Python 3. Use an older base image that supports Python 2.7 and our legacy dependencies.
# Category: container_security

FROM python:2.7-slim   # specify a specific old version of docker (python) with support for pyhton versions below or equal to it, we use 'latest' here as default if not specified before this line  and then set new image layer after that using the base on top by specifying its tag
